name: Chicken Tikka
recipeInstructions:
1. Rinse chicken and pat dry with paper towels. Cut into 3/4-inch cubes.
2. Thread the chicken pieces onto short skewers.
3. Place the skewered chicken in a shallow non-metal dish. In a small bowl, mix together yogurt, ginger, garlic, chile powder, coriander, salt, lime juice, and oil.
4. Pour the marinade over the skewered chicken and turn to coat completely.
5. Cover and refrigerate for 6 hours or overnight to allow the chicken to absorb flavors.
6. Heat the grill. Place the skewered chicken on the grill rack and cook for 5 to 7 minutes, turning the skewers occasionally and basting with any remaining marinade.
7. Serve hot, garnished with lime slices.
